Class DRDesignGenericElement

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignGenericElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignComponent, DRIDesignGenericElement, Serializable
